content:
I’m overhauling `custom.js` to bring the Persona Selector front and center. I’m injecting a `select` dropdown directly into the header with the original Gradio personas—Lookup, Grieve, and Manage—and wiring it up to hit the new `/forensic-action` endpoint on change. I’m also switching the Toolbox, Export, and Import header links to hit that same endpoint directly, ensuring those tools finally work exactly as you expect.

**Injecting the Persona Selector and fixing the header tools in `custom.js`.**

args.Description:
"Restored Persona Selector visibility by injecting it into the header.\n1. Implemented injectPersonaSelector() to place a visible dropdown next to the title.\n2. Switched header tool handlers (Toolbox, Export, Import) to use the direct /forensic-action Fas
<truncated 175 bytes>
args.toolAction: "Updating the custom.js file to inject the Persona Selector into the header and implement the forensic-action bridge."
